title: Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye Song Lyrics Thanimai Kadhal
stanzas:
Kannukulla nikkura
en kadhaliye
unna vittaa yaar thunaiye

kannamoodi thiranthaale
un mugamthaan
un ninaivugal pogalaiye

nenjukulla thudikkura
en heartu
un per solluthadi

enna vittu poga
nee nenachaa
 usure poguthadi

Kannukulla nikkura
en kadhaliye
unna vittaa yaar thunaiye

kannamoodi thiranthaale
un mugamthaan
un ninaivugal pogalaiye

adi maane thaene ponmaane
en kadhali endrum
neethaane

enna paathu
yaendi sirikkura
ulla yedho vachi
maraikkura

un mela kadhal
kuraiya villa
idhu yen di
unakku puriyavilla

kadhal endraal saabamaa
un kadhalicha naan paavamaa

naan thanimaiyil pesuren
naan thanimaiyil sirikuren
naan thanimaiyil azhuguren
kaaranam enna theriyavilla

un ninaivugal enna
vittu pogavilla.

ora kannaala enna paakkayila
ulla yedho aagudhu enakkula
unna marakka ennaala mudiyavilla
nee illatha vazhka thaevayilla

en kadhaliye enakku
romba pudikkum
ava pesunaa kozhandhaiyai
pol irukkum

enna pudikkaatha
maadhirithaan adhu nadikkum
aanaa kannu mattum
kaatti kodukkum

un azhaga patthi solla
vaarthai enkitta illa
enna marandhuttu
sorry solli poriye pulla

sirichu pesi pazhagi
enna yemaaththitta
enna konjam konjamaa
namba vachchi yendi
pirinjitta

thappu senjaa
thayavu seidhu
mannichidu di.
adhukkaaga pesaama
pogaathadi .

naan vazhnthaalum
seththaalum unkoodathaan
enga paathaalum unmugamthaan

unna mattum naa naa
nenachiruppen
nee varra varaikkum
kaathiruppen

nee enna marandhaa
naan uyirodavaa iruppen

en ice kattiye nee urgittiye
nee enna konjam
konjamaa marandhuttiye

unna
marakka nenachaalum
mudiyalaye
en kadhaliye devathaiye

pagalula unna paakkalannaa
iravula kan thoongaathu.
iravula kanavula neeyillanaa
en pozhudhey vidiyaathu.

Kannukulla nikkura
en kadhaliye
unna vittaa yaar thunaiye

kannamoodi thiranthaale
un mugamthaan
un ninaivugal pogalaiye

hey paaru enna enna paaru
enaku pudichathu SUPER STARu
oorukkulla enna paththi
kaettupaaru
enga schooloda vaathiyaaru
naan latea pona enna thittuvaaru

yaenda late-a vandhenu
avar kaettaa naan solluven
sir I am sorry.

so this is my character
ippadithaan iruppen eppodhume
thuru thurunu
king of the schoolu
naan oru vaalu
evan vandhaalum no Ballu

theriyaathanama en lifeula
vandhutta
therinjaa nee enna
vilagi poyita

marakka nenachaalum
marakka mudiyala
kanmunna nee
vandhu nikkura

kaadhalaala kanna
katti pottava
vera ponna paakka
nenachaalum mudiyala
thanimai romba valikkuthu
plz thaniyaa vittutu
poidaathadi .

enakku theriyum di
unna paththi un parente
yaena avangalukku
enna pudikkala di
konjam kooda yaethukaladi

jaathi madham ellaam
paakkaatha adhu
konja naal kooda
thaangaathu

ellaa kadhalum
nalla kadhal thaan
kalla kadhal endru
onnum kedaiyaathuthaan

konjam wait pannanum
konjam purinjukanum
ava sonnaa unmai
yaeththukanum

bayappada venaam di
un purushan naanthaandi
pala thadaigalaiyum thaandi
unna vazha vaippen di

saave vandhaalum
naan saaga maatten di
seththe ponaalum
unna vittu poga maatten di

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and heartbreak.

When was Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye released?

The song was released on January 21, 2018.

Who are the artists involved in Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye?

The specific artists involved in the song are unknown.

What emotions does Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye evoke?

The song evokes emotions of sadness and longing, reflecting on lost love.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye from the album Thanimai Kadhal captures the deep emotions of love and longing. It paints a vivid picture of heartbreak and the pain of separation, resonating with anyone who has experienced similar feelings. The lyrics convey a sense of yearning and the struggle to move on, while the melody enhances the melancholic mood. This song is a perfect companion for those moments of introspection and emotional reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the poignant emotions of Kannukula Nikira En Kadhaliye, a heart-touching melody from the album Thanimai Kadhal. This song beautifully captures the essence of longing and love lost, resonating deeply with anyone who has experienced heartbreak. Let the soulful lyrics and haunting tune transport you to a world of introspection and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: My love who stands in my eyes, if I leave you, who will be my companion?
When I open my eyes, it's your face I see, your memories don't leave me.
My heart beats inside, saying your name.
If you think of leaving me, my life will go away.
My love who stands in my eyes, if I leave you, who will be my companion?
When I open my eyes, it's your face I see, your memories don't leave me.
Oh dear, sweet one, golden one, you are always my love.
Why are you looking at me and smiling, hiding something inside?
My love for you doesn't decrease, why don't you understand this?
Is love a curse? Am I a sinner for loving you?
I talk to myself in loneliness, I smile in loneliness, I cry in loneliness, I don't know why.
Your memories don't leave me.
You don't look at me with one eye, something is happening inside me, I can't forget you, I don't need a life without you.
I really like my love, when she talks, she is like a child.
She acts like she doesn't like me, but her eyes show it.
I don't have words to describe your beauty, you forgot me and said sorry, and left.
You talked and laughed with me, fooled me, made me trust you a little, and then left.
If I made a mistake, please forgive me. Don't leave without talking.
Whether I live or die, I want to be with you, wherever I look, I see your face.
I will think only of you, I will wait until you come.
If you forget me, will I still be alive?
You tasted my ice candy, you forgot me a little.
Even if I try to forget you, I can't, my love, my angel.
If I don't see you in the day, I can't sleep at night. If you're not in my dreams at night, my time doesn't pass.
My love who stands in my eyes, if I leave you, who will be my companion?
When I open my eyes, it's your face I see, your memories don't leave me.
Hey look at me, what do you see? I like SUPER STAR, ask about me in the town, my school teacher will scold me if I'm late.
If he asks why I'm late, I'll say, 'Sir, I am sorry.'
So this is my character, I will always be like this, always active, king of the school, I'm a smart one, no one can beat me.
You came into my life unknowingly, if you knew, you would have gone away.
Even if I try to forget, I can't, you stand in front of me.
Love has blinded me, even if I try to see another girl, I can't, loneliness hurts a lot, please don't leave me alone.
I know about you, your parents don't like me, they don't accept me at all.
Don't look at caste or religion, it can't last even a few days.
All love is good love, there's no such thing as fake love.
Wait a little, understand a little, accept the truth when she says it.
Don't be afraid, I'm your husband, I'll overcome all obstacles and make you live.
Even if death comes, I won't die, even if I die, I won't leave you.
My love who stands in my eyes, if I leave you, who will be my companion?
When I open my eyes, it's your face I see, your memories don't leave me.
My heart beats inside, saying your name.
If you think of leaving me, my life will go away.
